hypometrics 0.0.9

Package index

Package Index

CGM functions

Functions for managing CGM data

cgmCheck()
Checking Daily Patterns of Missingness in CGM data
cgmInterpolate()
Implicit to Explicit Missingness and Linear Interpolation of Glucose Data.
cgmSummarise()
Key Continuous Glucose Monitoring Metrics
cgmVisualise()
Visualise Glucose Data
sdhDetection()
Detection and Description of Episodes of Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) Hypoglycaemia
sdhSummarise()
Key Sensor-Detected Hypoglycaemia Metrics

Physical Activity functions

Functions for managing physical activity data

activityRead()
Unzip, Read and Combine Raw Activity Files Dowloaded From User's Fitbit account
activityVisualise()
Visualise Activity data

Sleep functions

Functions for managing sleep data

sleepRead()
Unzip, Read and Combine Raw Sleep Files Downloaded From User's Fitbit account
sleepCategorise()
Categorise Sleep Information from Fitbit Raw Data
sleepSummarise()
Summarises Sleep Information from Fitbit Raw Data
sleepVisualise()
Visualise Sleeping Patterns

uMotif functions

Functions for managing uMotif data

umotifRead()
Unzips and Reads Raw uMotif Files Downloaded From the Data Download Portal
umotifClean()
Cleans Raw uMotif Files Downloaded From the Data Download Portal
prhLink()
Links Real-Time and Retrospective uMotif Person-Reported Hypoglycaemia (PRH) Data
prhSummarise()
Key Person-Reported Hypoglycaemia Metrics
prhVisualise()
Visualise uMotif Symptoms Data

Linking functions

Functions for linking and visualising CGM data with Fitbit and uMotif data

cgmsleepLink()
Links Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) Data with Sleep Data
cgmactivityLink()
Links Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) Data with Activity Data
cgmactivityVisualise()
Visualise Glucose linked with Activity Data
cgmprhLink()
Links Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) Time Series Data with Person-Reported Hypoglycaemia (PRH) Data
cgmprhVisualise()
Visualise Glucose linked with Person-Reported Hypoglycaemia (PRH) Data
sdhprhLink()
Links Sensor-Detected Hypoglycaemia (SDH) with Person-Reported Hypoglycaemia (PRH) episodes

Data

cgm
Dataset containing glucose data of 3 participants who used a CGM device
raw_checkin
Dataset containing raw morning questionnaire data of 2 participants who used the Hypo-METRICS app on the uMotif platform
raw_cgm
Dataset containing raw glucose data of 2 participants who used a CGM device
raw_eq5d5l
Dataset containing raw EQ5D5L questionnaire data of 2 participants who used the Hypo-METRICS app on the uMotif platform
raw_hr
Dataset containing raw heart rate data of 2 participants who used a Fitbit Charge 4
raw_motif_segment
Dataset containing raw umotif data of 2 participants who used the Hypo-METRICS app on the uMotif platform
raw_promis
Dataset containing raw promis questionnaire data of 2 participants who used the Hypo-METRICS app on the uMotif platform
raw_sleep
Dataset containing raw sleep data of 2 participants who used a Fitbit Charge 4
raw_step
Dataset containing raw step count data of 2 participants who used a Fitbit Charge 4
raw_wpai
Dataset containing raw WPAI questionnaire data of 2 participants who used the Hypo-METRICS app on the uMotif platform

On this page

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
